## Intel Reported to Have Lost Data Center Revenue Leadership to AMD

A revenue leadership reversal in data center would validate AMD's multi-year execution on EPYC and raises urgent questions about Intel's path to stabilization; directional read supports AMD thesis and increases pressure on Intel's turnaround timeline.

- Headline claims AMD has surpassed Intel in data center revenue — a significant competitive milestone if confirmed.
- Coverage frames this as a structural shift in the x86 data center rivalry.
- Both tickers are directly affected: AMD as the apparent share gainer, Intel as the incumbent under pressure.
- No specific revenue figures or timeframe confirmed in the single-outlet headline.
